Game.Name: Wizap! - Ankoku no Ou (Japan) (Beta)
Game.plot: Overview:Wizap!: Ankoku no Ou ("Wizap!: King of Darkness") is a Super Famicom JRPG that was never released outside of Japan. It is the second game in ASCII's Dark Lord trilogy, which are all linked by the same world. The game features top-down turn-based strategic combat.The game sits between the 1991 Famicom RPG Dark Lord and the late-era SFC RPG Dark Law from 1997 in the Dark Lord series.
Game.Notes: Wizap! Ankoku no Ou is a Role-Playing game, developed by SAS Sakata and published by ASCII Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 1994.
